name: Scaollops in Sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 550°F.
2. Turn the oven setting to Broil.
3. If using cheap scallops, marinate them with sweet sherry and salt for a few minutes.
4. Melt the butter. Put half into a serving casserole dish.
5. Mix the other half of the melted butter with the breadcrumbs.
6. Place scallops in the butter-bottomed casserole dish.
7. Top the scallops with crumbs, then sprinkle sherry and pepper over them.
8. Broil until the crumbs are golden, for just a few minutes.
